verdict_summary: Logged-in m365.cloud.microsoft/chat session captured; WSS chat hub identified as substrate.office.com/m365Copilot/Chathub/{oid}@{tid} (NOT m365.cloud.microsoft itself). Microsoft side did NOT block the PII prompt — full decode returned.

evidence.ws_protocol: SignalR JSON Hub Protocol (0x1E record-separator framed)
evidence.secondary_wss_observed: wss://go.trouter.teams.microsoft.com/v4/c (Teams trouter signaling — not the chat hub)

notes: WSS host = substrate.office.com (SAME as legacy BizChat). The divergence axis for #867 is NOT the host but the PATH prefix: this session uses /m365Copilot/Chathub/ while legacy BizChat used /chathub/. Recommend extending APF domain_patterns to (host=substrate.office.com, path-prefix=/m365Copilot/). Auth via JWT access_token query param (aud=https://substrate.office.com/sydney, scp sydney.readwrite). Origin header is https://m365.cloud.microsoft. s2c content path for filter: arguments[0].messages[].text AND arguments[0].messages[].adaptiveCards[].body[].text. Final s2c bundle (signalR type=2) also carries echoed user prompt at item.messages[0].text — useful for retrospective block.
